title: AFI Analyst Strategy Registration v1 (FACTORY-CONTRACT — registry entry)
description: The canonical registry ENTRY (afi.analyst-strategy-registration.v1) recording that one analyst strategy configuration is registered: the canonical strategy identity triple, the canonical hash of the exact afi.analyst-strategy-config.v1 object (analystConfigHash), an immutable reference to where that config lives (configRef), the provider binding policy governing WHICH providers may route signals into this strategy, an active/inactive status, the administrative registration date, and the registration decision/PR pointer. One JSON file per identity under registries/analyst-strategies/.
$comment: BOUNDARY (FACTORY-CONTRACT): schema/contract only — registering an entry does NOT wire runtime consumption, confer UP-10 recognition, qualification, or rewards. registeredAt and registrationRef are ADMINISTRATIVE metadata: registeredAt is EXCLUDED from canonical hash material (schemas/hashing/canonical-json-hashing.v1.md). Cross-artifact resolution (does configRef resolve? does its canonical hash equal analystConfigHash? do allowedBindings exist and stay active?) is registry tooling's duty, recorded in x-afiConstraints.
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/factory-configurable-pipelines-v1 — authorizes the canonical V1 contract family and the analyst-strategy registry layout
afi-governance/decisions/object-identity-v0.1.md (OBJ-GOV) D-OBJ-3 — the canonical strategy identity triple this entry is keyed by
afi-governance/decisions/uwr-profile-pin-v0.1.md (PR-UWR) UP-10 — registration here is FACTORY registration (composition admission); protocol scorer-identity recognition remains UP-10's separate act

x-afiConstraints.configResolution: REGISTRY-TOOLING (not JSON-Schema-enforceable): configRef MUST resolve to an immutable afi.analyst-strategy-config.v1 object whose identity triple equals this entry's triple and whose canonical hash (excluding metadata) equals analystConfigHash. A dangling or hash-divergent configRef fails registration closed.
x-afiConstraints.bindingResolution: REGISTRY-TOOLING: when providerBindingPolicy.mode is 'explicit', every allowedBindings entry MUST name an existing, ACTIVE afi.provider-strategy-binding.v1 whose allowedStrategies contains this entry's triple. 'any-authenticated' admits any authenticated provider binding without enumeration.
x-afiConstraints.identityImmutability: An entry's triple + analystConfigHash never mutate. Corrections register a NEW strategyVersion; retirement flips status to 'inactive' (administrative update per the registry's generic rule) — the file is never deleted.
x-afiConstraints.hashExclusions: registeredAt is administrative and EXCLUDED from canonical hash material for this artifact type (canonical-json-hashing.v1). analystConfigHash itself hashes the CONFIG object, not this entry.
x-afiConstraints.strategyIdMajorAgreement: Same D-OBJ-3 cross-field rule as the config: strategyId's embedded major MUST equal strategyVersion's major. Enforced by tooling/tests.

schema.description: Schema-id version of the registry entry.

strategyId.description: Canonical triple member: bare snake_case slug with embedded major token; major must match strategyVersion (x-afiConstraints).

strategyVersion.description: Canonical triple member: semver, NO v prefix.

analystConfigHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 of the exact registered afi.analyst-strategy-config.v1 object (domain tag afi.factory.analyst-config; metadata excluded). The immutable pin the runtime verifies before composing.

configRef.description: Immutable reference to the registered config artifact (repo path or content-addressed ref), e.g. 'afi-config/examples/analyst-strategy-config/v1/....json' or a pinned git object ref. MUST resolve and hash-match (x-afiConstraints.configResolution).

providerBindingPolicy.description: Which providers may route signals into this strategy. 'explicit' enumerates binding ids; 'any-authenticated' admits any authenticated provider binding.

allowedBindings.description: REQUIRED when mode is 'explicit' (bound structurally by if/then below); forbidden semantics otherwise are advisory (ignored under any-authenticated).

status.description: Registry status. Only 'active' entries are resolvable at runtime; 'inactive' retires without deletion (supersession discipline).

registeredAt.description: ADMINISTRATIVE registration date (YYYY-MM-DD). Excluded from canonical hash material (x-afiConstraints.hashExclusions).

registrationRef.description: Pointer to the registering act (PR URL/number or decision reference).
